description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the php:7.0 Docker image and caches the vendor/ directory. Define a global before_script that updates apt, installs git, wget, zlib1g-dev, installs the PHP extensions zip and exif, installs Xdebug via pecl and enables it, downloads and verifies the Composer installer, runs Composer install, and creates a testuser system account. In the default test stage add a job named php:7.0 that runs php vendor/bin/phpstan analyse --no-progress -l 7 src -c phpstan.neon. Then it echoes "Running PHPUnit Tests" and executes the PHPUnit test suite as testuser with su testuser -c "php vendor/bin/phpunit --colors=\"never\" --coverage-text". The job uses the cached vendor/ directory and does not produce any artifacts or special triggers.
